subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath quickened His servants with the living waters of His knowledge, guided them unto His path, and made known unto them His tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی احیا العباد بکوثر عرفانه و هدیهم الی صراطه و عرفهم نباه و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement
